info.title: egdata.app API
info.description: REST API for Epic Games Store catalog, pricing, search, and public egdata.app data. This contract starts with public stable REST endpoints and will expand as legacy routes are classified.

tags.name: Regions
tags.description: Country and Epic pricing region helpers.

tags.name: Offer Details
tags.description: Offer subresources such as items, media, builds, ratings, and related data.

tags.name: Offer Reviews
tags.description: Read-only public review data for offers.

tags.name: Free Games
tags.description: Current and historical free game promotions.

post.summary: Search offers with OpenSearch-backed filters and aggregations

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

post.description: Embeds the query with Cloudflare Workers AI, ranks offer vectors in Cloudflare Vectorize, and hydrates the ranked vector IDs from canonical Mongo offer documents. Stale vectors that no longer resolve to an offer are omitted.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

502.description: Cloudflare Workers AI or Vectorize is unavailable.

post.summary: Search offers with the legacy Mongo-backed implementation
post.description: Legacy search endpoint retained for compatibility. New integrations should prefer POST /search/v2/search.

get.summary: List recent changelog records
get.description: Returns recent changelog entries with best-effort `metadata.context` enrichment. Context is null when unavailable.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.summary: Get a changelog record
get.description: Returns a single changelog entry with best-effort `metadata.context` enrichment. Missing changelog IDs return 404.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.summary: Search changelog records
get.description: Searches changelog entries and hydrates `metadata.changes[].oldValue` and `newValue` from canonical Mongo records or raw OpenSearch values. Search hits include best-effort `document` enrichment.

EpicSession.name: session
EpicSession.description: egdata.app browser session backed by Epic authentication.

country.name: country
country.description: ISO country code used to resolve an Epic Games Store pricing region. Defaults to the EGDATA_COUNTRY cookie, then US.

locale.name: locale
locale.description: Exact BCP-47-style locale used to overlay localized public offer text fields. Defaults to en-US.

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Maximum number of records to return. Most list endpoints cap this server-side.

region.name: region
region.description: Epic pricing region code. When present it takes precedence over country on routes that support both.

since.name: since
since.description: Only return records at or after this timestamp.

verified.name: verified
verified.description: Filter reviews by verified ownership status.

entitlementType.name: entitlementType
entitlementType.description: Comma-separated entitlement types for sandbox item filtering.

status.name: status
status.description: Comma-separated item statuses for sandbox item filtering.

platforms.name: platforms
platforms.description: Comma-separated platforms for sandbox item filtering.

platform.name: platform
platform.description: Comma-separated platforms for sandbox asset or build filtering.

sandboxOfferType.name: offerType
sandboxOfferType.description: Comma-separated offer types for sandbox offer filtering.

CountryMap.description: Map of ISO country codes to display names and region metadata.

Offer.description: Public Epic Games Store offer DTO.

locale.description: Requested locale applied to this offer response.

localeStatus.description: Whether this offer is canonical en-US data, localized with an exact locale record, or fell back to canonical text.

canonicalLocale.description: Canonical source locale, present on non-canonical responses.

OfferLocalizationMetadata.description: Metadata from the exact offer localization record used for this response.

query.description: Natural-language description of the desired offers.

topK.description: Maximum number of Vectorize neighbors to hydrate.

score.description: Similarity score returned by Cloudflare Vectorize.

count.description: Number of Vectorize matches that still resolve to Mongo offer documents.

Item.description: Public Epic Games Store item DTO.

Asset.description: Epic asset or generated virtual asset.

Build.description: Build metadata associated with an Epic app or asset.

AchievementSet.description: Epic achievement set for a sandbox.

Review.description: Public user review for an offer.

oldValue.description: Parsed changelog value. May be an object, array, boolean, number, string, or null.

newValue.description: Parsed changelog value. May be an object, array, boolean, number, string, or null.

oldValueRaw.description: Raw OpenSearch value retained for compatibility when present.

newValueRaw.description: Raw OpenSearch value retained for compatibility when present.

ChangelogContext.description: Best-effort context document for a changelog entry. Null when enrichment is unavailable.

contextType.description: Kind of document that changed, such as offer, item, asset, product-home, or build.

contextId.description: Identifier used to resolve the changed document or context.

Price.description: Regional offer price from the price engine.

FreeGamesResponse.description: Current and upcoming Epic free game promotions, enriched with giveaway and regional price data.

ChangelogEntry.description: Change record for an offer, item, asset, or build.

document.description: Best-effort document associated with search results. Null when enrichment is unavailable.
